testcase.name: registerWithWrongCode shouldFailAndNotCreateUser
testcase.system-out: timestamp = 2026-02-26T16:59:49.557916, AuthServiceInvalidCodePropertyTest:registerWithWrongCode shouldFailAndNotCreateUser = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 144 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 26 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = -8357492824792279548 | random seed to reproduce generated values
testcase.system-err: 2月 26, 2026 4:59:49 下午 net.jqwik.engine.properties.RandomizedShrinkablesGenerator logEdgeCasesOutnumberTriesIfApplicable 信息: Edge case generation exceeds number of tries. Stopped after 144 generated cases. 2月 26, 2026 4:59:49 下午 com.yeahmobi.everything.auth.AuthServiceImpl sendVerificationCode 信息: 【EmailService 未配置，控制台输出】验证码: JI610GquiK@test.org -> 870356 2月 26, 2026 testcase.name: registerWithExpiredCode shouldFailAndNotCreateUser
testcase.system-out: timestamp = 2026-02-26T16:59:49.579161, AuthServiceInvalidCodePropertyTest:registerWithExpiredCode shouldFailAndNotCreateUser = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 72 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 18 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = -7875112055693653595 | random seed to reproduce generated values
